simulation.title: Simulation Run
simulation.description: A saved takeoff simulation run with core aero control inputs and outcome

userId.description: Unique user ID of the authenticated pilot

timestamp.description: Server or calendar timestamp of simulation

success.description: Flag representing whether takeoff was accomplished before runway overrun

liftoffDistance.description: The runway coordinate of liftoff in meters

liftoffTime.description: The runway time of liftoff in seconds

finalDistance.description: The exact maximum runway distance covered in meters

finalVelocity.description: The exact maximum speed attained in meters per second

reason.description: Detailed validation text or overrun warning description
